title: Create: Data and Plots
description: Create graphs and plots in Create (Fabric)

![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_64h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_64h.png?raw=true) ![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png?raw=true) ![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/built-with/java_64h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/built-with/java_64h.png?raw=true) ![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/requires/create_64h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/requires/create_64h.png?raw=true)   

## Addon Info
**Dashboard block recipe:**  
  
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/644f95b49f89ea01f21ca862bdb28f7d8d2ce40d.png)
  
**How to use:**
1. Place dashboard block somewhere.
2. Place smart-observer next to container (for example, chest).
3. Place display link, that targets to dashboard, on the observer.  
4. Select "List matching items" type in display link.
5. Done! ✅ 
  
![Barplot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dea5e61fddfbeb73776868c756c67d05b07ed8c3.png)

| ⚠ Create: Data and Plots is indev. It may have a lot of changes.  |
